org.apache.bookkeeper.common.conf.Validator

Packages that use Validator
Package
Description
org.apache.bookkeeper.common.conf
Configuration related utilities.
org.apache.bookkeeper.common.conf.validators
A collection of validators that validate configuration settings.

    Classes in org.apache.bookkeeper.common.conf.validators that implement Validator
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ClassValidator<T>
    Validator that validates a configuration setting is returning a given type of class.
    class 
    NullValidator

    class 
    RangeValidator
    Validator that validates a configuration value is in a numeric range.
